recommendations.title: Viking Wolf
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a grotesque murder at a party in her new town, a teenager starts having strange visions and bizarre desires.

recommendations.title: Whip It
recommendations.overview: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

recommendations.title: Closet Monster
recommendations.overview: A creative and driven teenager is desperate to escape his hometown and the haunting memories of his turbulent childhood.

recommendations.title: Take Shelter
recommendations.overview: Plagued by a series of apocalyptic visions, a young husband and father questions whether to shelter his family from a coming storm, or from himself.

recommendations.title: The Nines
recommendations.overview: A troubled actor, a television show runner, and an acclaimed videogame designer find their lives intertwining in mysterious and unsettling ways.

recommendations.title: Winnie the Pooh: Springtime with Roo
recommendations.overview: Spring has sprung, and baby Roo is excited to get out and explore and make new friends. But Rabbit seems preoccupied with spring cleaning, instead of embracing his usual role of playing Easter Bunny. Leave it to Roo to show Rabbit -- through love --

recommendations.title: Harvey
recommendations.overview: The story of Elwood P. Dowd who makes friends with a spirit taking the form of a human-sized rabbit named Harvey that only he sees (and a few privileged others on occasion also.) After his sister tries to commit him to a mental institution, a comedy

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: Cuckoo
recommendations.overview: After reluctantly moving to the German Alps with her father and his new family, Gretchen discovers that their new town hides sinister secrets, as she's plagued by strange noises and frightening visions of a woman pursuing her.

recommendations.title: Mirrors 2
recommendations.overview: When Max, who is recovering from a traumatic accident, takes a job as a nighttime security guard, he begins to see visions of a young mysterious woman in the store's mirror.
